Biography

Director of MIT CSAIL. Pioneer of soft robotics and autonomous systems.

Key Influence

Directing MIT CSAIL and pioneering soft robotics and scalable robot design.

Awards & Recognition

MIT CSAIL Director, IEEE/AAAI Fellow
